name: Waxman, Joel

evidence: Joel Waxman is founder/CIO and Managing Partner of Paramount Specialty Finance, an Austin commercial real estate investment firm focused on net-lease development lending (>$1.4B closed since 2015); UT Austin grad. Classified Real Estate to match his stated occupation; Finance is the defensible alternative since the firm is a specialty lender into CRE deals.
